title: Light Slovakian Wonton Skin Dumplings
description: A traditional Slovakian dish featuring wonton skin, filled with a yeast based mixture, steamed to perfection in a bamboo steamer, this recipe is egg free friendly and suitable for all

ingredients.name: active dry yeast
ingredients.notes: make sure to activate before use

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the warm water, sugar, and yeast, stir to dissolve the yeast and let it sit for 5 minutes
Add the salt, vegetable oil, onion, and garlic to the bowl and mix until well combined
Lay a wonton skin on a flat surface and place a small spoonful of the yeast mixture in the center of the skin
Dip your finger in a small amount of water and run it along the edges of the skin
Fold the skin into a triangle by bringing the two opposite corners together to form a point
Press the edges together to seal the dumpling
Repeat the process with the remaining wonton skins and yeast mixture
Place the dumplings in a bamboo steamer lined with parchment paper, leaving some space between each dumpling
Steam the dumplings over boiling water for 10 minutes, or until they are cooked through and fluffy
Serve the dumplings hot with your favorite dipping sauce
